narrative.description: Rare's N64 collectathon defines the genre with Gruntilda's lair hub, jigsaw piece expansion, and move-teaching Bottles sequences across nine themed worlds.
narrative.core_loop: Collect jiggies and notes in hub-linked worlds, learn moves from Bottles, transform via Mumbo, and climb Gruntilda's lair to rescue Tooty.

mechanics.map_notes: Jiggies expand Gruntilda's lair; notes gate move tutorials and 100-note doors.
mechanics.expression: Jiggies expand Gruntilda's lair; notes gate move tutorials and 100-note doors.

mechanics.map_notes: Gruntilda's lair hub connects to nine worlds via jigsaw piece expansion.
mechanics.expression: Gruntilda's lair hub connects to nine worlds via jigsaw piece expansion.

mechanics.map_notes: Bottles teaches talon trot, beak bomb, flight pad, and other moves gating new areas.
mechanics.expression: Bottles teaches talon trot, beak bomb, flight pad, and other moves gating new areas.

mechanics.map_notes: Mumbo tokens transform Banjo into termite, crocodile, pumpkin, and other forms.
mechanics.expression: Mumbo tokens transform Banjo into termite, crocodile, pumpkin, and other forms.

mechanics.map_notes: Banjo and Kazooie combine for distinct attack and traversal options.
mechanics.expression: Banjo and Kazooie combine for distinct attack and traversal options.

mechanics.map_notes: Jinjos, eggs, and secret stops extend 100% completion.
mechanics.expression: Jinjos, eggs, and secret stops extend 100% completion.

mechanics.map_notes: New moves reveal jiggies in previously visited worlds.
mechanics.expression: New moves reveal jiggies in previously visited worlds.

mechanics.map_notes: Rusty bucket bay, Gobi's valley, and Clanker's cavern test mastery.
mechanics.expression: Rusty bucket bay, Gobi's valley, and Clanker's cavern test mastery.

mechanics.map_notes: Gruntilda's quiz and final fight gate story completion.
mechanics.expression: Gruntilda's quiz and final fight gate story completion.

mechanics.map_notes: World bosses like Conga follow learnable attack cycles.
mechanics.expression: World bosses like Conga follow learnable attack cycles.

mechanics.map_notes: Flight pads and Kazooie flight extend aerial exploration.
mechanics.expression: Flight pads and Kazooie flight extend aerial exploration.

mechanics.map_notes: World entrances checkpoint progress between sessions.
mechanics.expression: World entrances checkpoint progress between sessions.

mechanics.map_notes: Rat-a-tat rap and roll attack clear enemies.
mechanics.expression: Rat-a-tat rap and roll attack clear enemies.

mechanics.map_notes: Gruntilda's spells telegraph before area-wide attacks.
mechanics.expression: Gruntilda's spells telegraph before area-wide attacks.

mechanics.map_notes: Golden feathers act as extra lives for stage attempts.
mechanics.expression: Golden feathers act as extra lives for stage attempts.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Banjo-Kazooie through its core platformer loop.
